Class GeometryBagClass

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll
[Guid("10B5F5C0-3781-11D2-BCC5-0000F875BCCE")]
[ClassInterface(ClassInterfaceType.None)]
public class GeometryBagClass : GeometryBag, IGeometry5, IGeometry4, IGeometry3, IGeometry2, IGeometryBag, IGeometry, IRelationalOperator, ITopologicalOperator, IGeometryCollection, IEnumGeometry, IConstructGeometryCollection, ISupportErrorInfo, IClone, IPersistStream, IPersist, ITransform2D, ISpatialIndex, IXMLVersionSupport, IXMLSerialize

Explicit Interface Implementations

AddGeometries(int, ref IGeometry)

Adds references to the specified geometries. This method is intended for internal use only.

virtual void AddGeometries(int Count, ref IGeometry newGeometries)

Parameters

Count int
newGeometries IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

AddGeometry(IGeometry, ref object, ref object) 

virtual void AddGeometry(IGeometry inGeometry, ref object before, ref object after)

Parameters

inGeometry IGeometry
before object
after object

Parameters

newGeometries IGeometryCollection

AllowIndexing

Indicates whether to allow a spatial index to be created for this geometry.

virtual bool AllowIndexing { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Assign(IClone) 

virtual void Assign(IClone src)

Parameters

src IClone

Boundary

The boundary of this geometry. A polygon's boundary is a polyline. A polyline's boundary is a multipoint. A point or multipoint's boundary is an empty point or multipoint.

virtual IGeometry Boundary { get; }

Returns

IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

Buffer(double)

Constructs a polygon that is the locus of points at a distance less than or equal to a specified distance from this geometry.

virtual IGeometry Buffer(double distance)

Parameters

distance double

Returns

IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

CentroidEx

The center of gravity (centroid).

virtual IPoint CentroidEx { get; }

Returns

IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

Changed

Indicates if a geometry has been changed (edited, projected, etc).

virtual bool Changed { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Returns

Envelope

Creates a copy of this geometry's envelope and returns it.

virtual IEnvelope Envelope { get; }

Returns

IEnvelope

"baseline"></span></span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
&nbsp;</p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=

<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">public</span> <span style="COLOR: blue">static</span>
<span style="COLOR: teal">IGeometry</span>
GetEnvelopeGeometry()</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> {</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">const</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">double</span> DeltaX = 2.5;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">const</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">double</span> DeltaY = 2.5;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">const</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">double</span> DeltaZ = 2.5;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: teal">IPoint</span> centerPoint =
GetPoint();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: teal">IEnvelope</span> envelope = <span style=
"COLOR: blue">new</span> <span style=
"COLOR: teal">EnvelopeClass</span>();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
envelope.XMin = centerPoint.X - DeltaX;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
envelope.XMax = centerPoint.X + DeltaX;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
envelope.YMin = centerPoint.Y - DeltaY;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
envelope.YMax = centerPoint.Y + DeltaY;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
envelope.ZMin = centerPoint.Z - DeltaZ;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
envelope.ZMax = centerPoint.Z + DeltaZ;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
MakeZAware(envelope <span style="COLOR: blue">as</span>
<span style="COLOR: teal">IGeometry</span>);</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">return</span> envelope <span style=
"COLOR: blue">as</span> <span style=
"COLOR: teal">IGeometry</span>;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style="MARGIN: 0in 0in 10pt"><span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; LINE-HEIGHT: 115%; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
}</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">private</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">static</span> <span style="COLOR: teal">IPoint</span>
GetPoint()</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> {</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">const</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">double</span> Min = -10;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">const</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">double</span> Max = 10;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: teal">Random</span> random = <span style=
"COLOR: blue">new</span> <span style=
"COLOR: teal">Random</span>();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">double</span> x = Min + (Max - Min) *
random.NextDouble();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">double</span> y = Min + (Max - Min) *
random.NextDouble();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">double</span> z = Min + (Max - Min) *
random.NextDouble();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">return</span> ConstructPoint3D(x, y,
z);</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> }</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
private</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
static</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: teal; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
IPoint</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
ConstructPoint3D(</span><span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">double</span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
x,</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
double</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
y,</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
double</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
z)</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
{</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: teal; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
IPoint</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
point = ConstructPoint2D(x, y);</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
point.Z = z;<br>
<br>
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
return</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
point;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
}<br>
<br style="mso-special-character: line-break">
<br style="mso-special-character: line-break"></span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
private</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
static</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: teal; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
IPoint</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
ConstructPoint2D(</span><span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">double</span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
x,</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
double</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
y)</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
{</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: teal; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
IPoint</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
point =</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
new</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: teal; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
PointClass</span><span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
point.PutCoords(x, y);<br>
<span style="mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;</span></span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
return</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
point;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 10pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal"><span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
}</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">private</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">static</span> <span style="COLOR: blue">void</span>
MakeZAware(<span style="COLOR: teal">IGeometry</span>
geometry)</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> {</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: teal">IZAware</span> zAware = geometry
<span style="COLOR: blue">as</span> <span style=
"COLOR: teal">IZAware</span>;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
zAware.ZAware = <span style="COLOR: blue">true</span>;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> }</span></p>

Equals(IGeometry) 

virtual bool Equals(IGeometry other)

Parameters

other IGeometry

Returns

bool

GeoNormalize()

Shifts longitudes, if need be, into a continuous range of 360 degrees.

virtual void GeoNormalize()

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeoNormalizeFromLongitude(double)

Normalizes longitudes into a continuous range containing the longitude. This method is obsolete.

virtual void GeoNormalizeFromLongitude(double Longitude)

Parameters

Longitude double

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeometriesChanged()

Tells this geometry collection that some of its geometries have been altered. Use this method on polylines, polygons and multipatches after directly editing one of its parts.

virtual void GeometriesChanged()

Examples

Sample Snippet

Geometry[int]

A reference to the ith geometry.

virtual IGeometry Geometry[int Index] { get; }

Parameters

Index int

Returns

IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeometryCount

The number of geometries in this collection.

virtual int GeometryCount { get; }

Returns

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeometryType

The type of this geometry.

virtual esriGeometryType GeometryType { get; }

Returns

esriGeometryType

Examples

Sample Snippet

pcbSize _ULARGE_INTEGER

InsertGeometries(int, int, ref IGeometry)

Inserts at the specified index references to some number of geometries in the input array. This method is intended for internal use only.

virtual void InsertGeometries(int Index, int Count, ref IGeometry newGeometries)

Parameters

Index int
Count int
newGeometries IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

InsertGeometryCollection(int, IGeometryCollection) 

virtual void InsertGeometryCollection(int Index, IGeometryCollection newGeometries)

Parameters

Index int
newGeometries IGeometryCollection

InterfaceSupportsErrorInfo(ref Guid) 

virtual void InterfaceSupportsErrorInfo(ref Guid riid)

Parameters

riid Guid

Intersect(IGeometry, esriGeometryDimension) 

virtual IGeometry Intersect(IGeometry other, esriGeometryDimension resultDimension)

Parameters

other IGeometry
resultDimension esriGeometryDimension

Returns

IGeometry

Invalidate()

Invalidate the spatial index.

virtual void Invalidate()

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsDirty() 

virtual void IsDirty()

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsEmpty

Indicates whether this geometry contains any points.

virtual bool IsEmpty { get; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsEqual(IClone) 

virtual bool IsEqual(IClone other)

Parameters

other IClone

Returns

bool

IsIdentical(IClone) 

virtual bool IsIdentical(IClone other)

Parameters

other IClone

Returns

bool

IsKnownSimple

Indicates whether this geometry is known (or assumed) to be topologically correct.

virtual bool IsKnownSimple { get; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsSimple

Indicates whether this geometry is known (or assumed) to be topologically correct, after explicitly determining this if the geometry is not already known (or assumed) to be simple.

virtual bool IsSimple { get; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Load(IStream) 

virtual void Load(IStream pstm)

Parameters

pstm IStream

LosslessExport

Indicates if this geometry bag exported itself to a shapefile buffer with no loss of information. Currently always returns false.

virtual bool LosslessExport { get; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

MinNamespaceSupported

The minimum namespace the class can serialize to (eg the 90 namespace).

virtual string MinNamespaceSupported { get; }

Returns

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Move(double, double)

Moves dx units horizontally and dy units vertically.

virtual void Move(double dx, double dy)

Parameters

dx double
dy double

Examples

Sample Snippet

MoveVector(ILine) 

virtual void MoveVector(ILine v)

Parameters

v ILine

Next()

Returns the next geometry in the enumeration.

virtual IGeometry Next()

Returns

IGeometry

Sample Snippet

other IGeometry

Returns

bool

newReferenceSystem ISpatialReference

outEnvelope IEnvelope

QueryGeometries(int, int, out IGeometry)

Populates the array with references to a sub-sequence of geometries. This method is intended for internal use only.

virtual void QueryGeometries(int Index, int Count, out IGeometry geometries)

Parameters

Index int
Count int
geometries IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryWKSEnvelope(out WKSEnvelope) 

virtual void QueryWKSEnvelope(out WKSEnvelope e)

Parameters

e WKSEnvelope

Relation(IGeometry, string) 

virtual bool Relation(IGeometry other, string relationDescription)

Parameters

other IGeometry
relationDescription string

Returns

bool

RemoveGeometries(int, int)

Removes references to some geometries from this collection.

virtual void RemoveGeometries(int Index, int Count)

Parameters

Index int
Count int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Reset()

Starts the enumeration at the beginning.

virtual void Reset()

Examples

Sample Snippet

Rotate(IPoint, double) 

virtual void Rotate(IPoint Origin, double rotationAngle)

Parameters

Origin IPoint
rotationAngle double

Save(IStream, int) 

virtual void Save(IStream pstm, int fClearDirty)

Parameters

pstm IStream
fClearDirty int

Scale(IPoint, double, double) 

virtual void Scale(IPoint Origin, double sx, double sy)

Parameters

Origin IPoint
sx double
sy double

Serialize(IXMLSerializeData) 

virtual void Serialize(IXMLSerializeData data)

Parameters

data IXMLSerializeData

SetEmpty()

Removes all points from this geometry.

virtual void SetEmpty()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetGeometries(int, ref IGeometry)

Replaces all geometries in the collection with the specified number of references to those in the input array. This method is intended for internal use only.

virtual void SetGeometries(int Count, ref IGeometry newGeometries)

Parameters

Count int
newGeometries IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

SetGeometryCollection(IGeometryCollection) 

virtual void SetGeometryCollection(IGeometryCollection newParts)

Parameters

newParts IGeometryCollection

Simplify()

Makes this geometry topologically correct.

virtual void Simplify()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SnapToSpatialReference()

Moves points of this geometry so that they can be represented in the precision of the geometry's associated spatial reference system.

virtual void SnapToSpatialReference()

Examples

Sample Snippet

SpatialReference

The spatial reference associated with this geometry.

virtual ISpatialReference SpatialReference { get; set; }

Returns

ISpatialReference

Examples

Sample Snippet

SymmetricDifference(IGeometry) 

virtual IGeometry SymmetricDifference(IGeometry other)

Parameters

other IGeometry

Returns

IGeometry

Parameters

topologyCacheHandle long

virtual bool Touches(IGeometry other)

Parameters

other IGeometry

Returns

bool

Parameters

Direction esriTransformDirection
Transformation ITransformation

Parameters

other IGeometry

Returns

IGeometry

Within(IGeometry)

other IGeometry

Made with docfx
